---
name: Prompt Improvement
about: Suggest changes to an agent's prompt template
title: "[Prompt] "
labels: prompt-quality
assignees: ''
---

## Which agent

Ideator / Creator / Tester / Critic / Curator

## Current behavior

What the agent currently does that could be better. Include example output if possible.

## Desired behavior

What you'd like the agent to produce instead.

## Suggested prompt changes

Specific additions, removals, or rewording you'd recommend. Reference the template file in `prompts/` if applicable.

## Evidence

Before/after examples, iteration logs, or reasoning for why this change would improve output quality.
